## Checklist

- [ ] I rebuilt the CSS (`npm run build`) if I changed markup or classes
- [ ] PHP files pass `php -l` and JS passes `node --check`
- [ ] I tested the conversion flow locally and checked the browser console for CSP violations
- [ ] No secrets, real keys, or PFX passwords are included anywhere in this PR
